raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":1.0,"R1.3":0.0,"R1.4":0.7,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":0.7,"RX.3":0.7,"RX.4":0.3,"RX.5":0.3},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.4","R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"rationale":{"R1.1":"The delegation to review the section involves reframing the problem formalization and contribution claim, making conceptual reconstruction a central expected responsibility.","R1.2":"Verifying the logical consistency of the sequential decision problem description and aggregate dynamics is load-bearing for a valid review of this technical section.","R1.4":"Estimating the novelty of the unified evaluation framework and metrics relative to prior work is centrally expected in reviewing the claimed contribution.","R1.5":"Assessing and suggesting section-level structural reorganization for better narrative arc is a central responsibility in reviewing this descriptive section.","R1.6":"Polishing sentence- and paragraph-level grammar, flow, and conciseness is load-bearing for improving the clarity of this research writing section.","RX.1":"Reviewing the section includes checking for adequate disclosure of uncertainties in the model assumptions and dynamics.","RX.2":"The review should identify and suggest avoidance of any overclaims in the objective, contribution, and positioning statements.","RX.3":"Ensuring the section adheres to its scope of formalizing the V2G problem without deviation is important for the review.","RX.4":"Considering potential downstream harms such as grid instability from V2G discharge is peripheral to the review but included as a nice-to-have.","RX.5":"Checking provenance and traceability of the aggregate representation and transition equations is a peripheral aspect of reviewing the section."}}

rationale.R1.1: The delegation to review the section involves reframing the problem formalization and contribution claim, making conceptual reconstruction a central expected responsibility.
rationale.R1.2: Verifying the logical consistency of the sequential decision problem description and aggregate dynamics is load-bearing for a valid review of this technical section.
rationale.R1.4: Estimating the novelty of the unified evaluation framework and metrics relative to prior work is centrally expected in reviewing the claimed contribution.
rationale.R1.5: Assessing and suggesting section-level structural reorganization for better narrative arc is a central responsibility in reviewing this descriptive section.
rationale.R1.6: Polishing sentence- and paragraph-level grammar, flow, and conciseness is load-bearing for improving the clarity of this research writing section.
rationale.RX.1: Reviewing the section includes checking for adequate disclosure of uncertainties in the model assumptions and dynamics.
rationale.RX.2: The review should identify and suggest avoidance of any overclaims in the objective, contribution, and positioning statements.
rationale.RX.3: Ensuring the section adheres to its scope of formalizing the V2G problem without deviation is important for the review.
rationale.RX.4: Considering potential downstream harms such as grid instability from V2G discharge is peripheral to the review but included as a nice-to-have.
rationale.RX.5: Checking provenance and traceability of the aggregate representation and transition equations is a peripheral aspect of reviewing the section.
